bugs.requirement: UC-01: JSON key presence validation must not match string values — REQ-001
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — json_has_key returns true when key name appears only in a string value (grep -q without colon check)
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (adding [[:space:]]*: to grep pattern), json_has_key correctly returns false for key name in string value

bugs.requirement: UC-01: Repo path array reconstruction must preserve spaces in paths — REQ-002
bugs.red_phase: Regression test does not trigger in bash 3.2.57 on macOS arm64 — word-splitting behavior is environment-dependent. Bug exists as a code pattern risk (unquoted outer expansion at lines 686 and 697 is POSIX-incorrect) but is not reproducible in current test environment.
bugs.green_phase: Fix patch correctly quotes outer expansion — paths with spaces preserved as single elements in both loop (line 686) and array assignment (line 697). Fix verified by inline test.

bugs.requirement: UC-02: Phase 2 entry gate must enforce all Phase 1 completion gate checks — REQ-003
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — Phase 1 completion gate has 12 numbered checks, Phase 2 entry gate has only 6. Missing checks: 2, 3, 5, 8, 10, 12.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (adding items 7-12 to Phase 2 entry gate), the count reaches 12 matching Phase 1's 12 checks. Simulated verification confirms fix.

bugs.requirement: UC-01: Gate must fail when bugs exist but no test_regression.* file — REQ-004
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — gate does not specifically FAIL for missing test_regression.* when bug_count > 0. Gate checks patches but not the source file.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (adding explicit test_regression.* existence check before patches section), gate correctly FAILs for missing test_regression.* file.

bugs.requirement: UC-02: Phase 0b seed discovery must run when previous_runs/ exists but empty — REQ-005
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — Phase 0b activation says 'does not exist' only, creating a gap when previous_runs/ exists but is empty.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (extending condition to cover empty directory case and adding warning message), Phase 0b correctly activates when previous_runs/ exists but is empty.

bugs.requirement: UC-01: json_str_val must distinguish absent key from key with non-string value — REQ-007
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — json_str_val returns empty string for both absent key and key with numeric value, making error messages misleading.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (two-step lookup returning __NOT_STRING__ for non-string values), function correctly distinguishes absent/non-string/string cases.

bugs.requirement: UC-03: All SKILL.md version string occurrences must match frontmatter version — REQ-006
bugs.red_phase: Regression test reports 31 version strings differing from frontmatter 1.4.1 (due to historical prose references). All 8 current-version occurrences are consistent. Bug is a latent risk — no mechanical enforcement prevents stale versions after a bump.
bugs.green_phase: No fix patch — fix is adding CI/gate check for version consistency. Green phase not applicable.

bugs.requirement: UC-01: Artifact counting must be reliable across shell configurations including nullglob — REQ-002, REQ-014
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — vulnerable ls-glob patterns confirmed at lines 331 and 567 of quality_gate.sh. Under nullglob, unmatched globs cause ls to list current directory, producing wrong counts.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (replacing ls-glob patterns with find-based counting at all 6 vulnerable locations), the test confirms no vulnerable patterns remain.

bugs.requirement: UC-04: Spec audit must produce consistently named individual auditor reports — REQ-011
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — two incompatible auditor naming formats confirmed: YYYY-MM-DD-auditor-N.md (SKILL.md Phase 4) and auditor_<model>_<date>.md (RUN_SPEC_AUDIT.md).
bugs.green_phase: No fix patch — fix is standardizing naming format across SKILL.md, RUN_SPEC_AUDIT.md, and references/spec_audit.md. Green phase not applicable.

bugs.requirement: UC-03: Generated artifacts must use consistent schema version stamps — REQ-009
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — SKILL.md contains both schema_version '1.0' (recheck template at line 1965) and '1.1' (tdd-results and integration-results templates).
bugs.green_phase: No fix patch — fix is updating recheck template to '1.1' or adding documentation note. Green phase not applicable.

bugs.requirement: UC-03: tdd-results.json must use consistent field formats across all templates — REQ-009
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — Template 1 (artifact contract, line 135) uses UC-NN format for requirement field; Template 2 (Phase 5, line 1385) uses REQ-NNN format.
bugs.green_phase: No fix patch — fix is standardizing templates. Green phase not applicable.

bugs.requirement: REQ-015: Test file extension detection must use find-based methods, not ls-glob, across all shell configurations
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — ls-glob pattern 'func_test=$(ls ${q}/test_functional.* 2>/dev/null | head -1)' confirmed at quality_gate.sh:479. Under nullglob, returns CWD filename instead of empty.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (replacing ls-glob with find-based detection at line 479), test confirms no vulnerable ls-glob pattern for func_test assignment.

bugs.requirement: REQ-016: code_reviews directory content detection must use find-based methods, not ls-glob, across all shell configurations
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — ls-glob pattern '$(ls ${q}/code_reviews/*.md 2>/dev/null)' confirmed at quality_gate.sh:143. Under nullglob + empty directory, returns CWD listing — false pass.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (replacing ls-glob with find-based detection at line 143), test confirms no vulnerable ls-glob pattern for code_reviews check.

bugs.requirement: REQ-017: Recommendation enum values must be consistent across all spec documents — canonical values are SHIP, FIX BEFORE MERGE, BLOCK
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched document — references/review_protocols.md contains stale enum values 'SHIP IT' and 'FIX FIRST' at lines 94, 392, and 410. Gate enforces SHIP/FIX BEFORE MERGE/BLOCK at line 427.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (updating all three stale enum occurrences to canonical values), test confirms no stale enum values remain in reference file.

bugs.requirement: REQ-018: Gate must validate recheck-results.json and recheck-summary.md when recheck mode was run
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — grep for 'recheck' in quality_gate.sh returns zero matches. No validation section exists for recheck artifacts despite SKILL.md artifact contract table documenting both as required.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (adding recheck sidecar JSON validation section after integration sidecar JSON validation), gate contains recheck validation including key checks, schema_version, date, and summary companion file.

bugs.requirement: REQ-019: Functional test file existence check must use find-based detection, not ls-glob, across all shell configurations
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — ls-glob pattern 'if ls ${q}/test_functional.*' confirmed at quality_gate.sh:124. Under nullglob, unmatched globs cause ls to list current working directory, returning exit 0 — false PASS for missing test file.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (replacing ls-glob with find-based detection at line 124), inline verification confirms: find produces no output for empty directory (grep -q . exits 1 = FAIL), and correctly matches when test_functional.sh exists (grep -q . exits 0 = PASS).

bugs.requirement: REQ-020: BUGS.md heading regex must match severity-prefixed bug IDs (BUG-H1, BUG-M3, BUG-L6) generated by QFB Phase 3
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — echo '### BUG-H1' | grep -cE '^### BUG-[0-9]+' returns 0. Gate sets bug_count=0 for any BUGS.md using severity-prefix IDs, silently bypassing ALL TDD/patch/writeup validation (lines 223, 309, 564, 592).
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (extending regex to '^### BUG-([HML]|[0-9])[0-9]*'), all severity formats verified: BUG-H1→1, BUG-M3→1, BUG-L6→1, BUG-H17→1, BUG-001→1. ID extraction regex BUG-([HML][0-9]+|[0-9]+) correctly extracts all six test cases.

bugs.requirement: REQ-021: Gate must cross-validate tdd-results.json red_phase/green_phase values against corresponding log file first-line tags, per SKILL.md:1589
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — no cross-validation code found: grep for json_str_val near red_phase/green_phase → NO MATCH; grep for red_phase.*red_tag or red_tag.*red_phase → NO MATCH. Gate validates JSON field presence (lines 239-248) and log tag format (lines 322-325) independently with no comparison between them.
bugs.green_phase: No fix patch — fix requires new validation code section in quality_gate.sh implementing SKILL.md:1589 consistency check. Scope: extract json_str_val for red_phase/green_phase per bug, compare against log first-line tag, fail on contradiction.

bugs.requirement: REQ-022: Gate summary sub-key checks must use json_key_count for consistency with per-bug field checks
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — json_has_key used for summary checks (lines 259-265) while json_key_count used for per-bug checks (lines 239-248). Pattern: grep -q without colon anchor vs grep -c with colon anchor. Inconsistency confirmed.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (changing json_has_key to json_key_count with scount > 0 check), summary check uses colon-anchored pattern consistently with per-bug check.

bugs.requirement: REQ-023: Patch existence check must iterate per-bug ID, not count aggregates
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — aggregate ls-glob count pattern confirmed at quality_gate.sh:567. TDD log check at lines 316-345 uses per-bug iteration (correct); patch check uses aggregate count (incorrect). Concrete false-pass scenario documented.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (replacing aggregate ls-glob with per-bug find iteration matching TDD log pattern), test confirms aggregate count pattern is removed.

bugs.requirement: REQ-024: Phase 5 must include an entry gate verifying Phase 4 artifacts before proceeding
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — Phase 2 has explicit entry gate ('Phase 2 entry gate (mandatory — HARD STOP)') confirmed at SKILL.md:897. Phase 5 has no equivalent entry gate text. Asymmetry confirmed: fail-early at Phase 2, fail-late at Phase 5.
bugs.green_phase: No fix patch — spec-primary fix needed. Fix is adding Phase 5 entry gate text to SKILL.md Phase 5 opening section. Green phase skipped.

bugs.requirement: REQ-025: SEED_CHECKS.md must be added to artifact contract table with condition 'If Phase 0b ran'
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — SEED_CHECKS.md required by SKILL.md:1641 (Phase 5 artifact gate) but absent from canonical artifact contract table (lines 88-119). Self-contradiction in SKILL.md confirmed.
bugs.green_phase: No fix patch — spec-primary fix needed. Fix is adding SEED_CHECKS.md row to artifact contract table in SKILL.md. Green phase skipped.

bugs.requirement: REQ-026: Gate must validate integration-results.json groups[].result values against SKILL.md:1273 enum (pass, fail, skipped, error), consistent with tdd-results.json verdict validation at quality_gate.sh:294-296
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — grep for result enum values in quality_gate.sh integration block (lines 389-436) returns empty. Contrast: tdd verdict enum IS validated at lines 294-296. An integration-results.json with groups[].result: 'PASS' (wrong case) passes gate.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (adding groups[].result enum validation loop and uc_coverage value enum validation to integration block), test confirms enum check is present for both result and uc_coverage values.

bugs.requirement: REQ-027: Gate must validate integration-results.json summary sub-keys (total_groups, passed, failed, skipped) using json_key_count, consistent with tdd-results.json summary validation at quality_gate.sh:259-265
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — grep for total_groups in quality_gate.sh returns empty. Integration summary check at line 393 is root-key presence only. Contrast: tdd summary sub-keys ARE checked at lines 259-265. An integration-results.json with summary: {} passes gate.
bugs.green_phase: After applying fix patch (adding sub-key validation loop using json_key_count after integration summary root-key check), test confirms total_groups and other sub-keys are now validated.

bugs.requirement: REQ-028: Phase 2 entry gate must enforce Phase 1 completion gate check #1 (120-line minimum in EXPLORATION.md). Extends REQ-003 (BUG-M3) — BUG-M3 fix adds checks 2,3,5,8,10,12 but not check #1.
bugs.red_phase: Regression test fails on unpatched code — SKILL.md:850 confirms Phase 1 gate check #1 exists (120-line minimum). awk on SKILL.md lines 890-940 returns empty for '120'. After BUG-M3 fix, EXPLORATION.md with 6 section stubs (~15 lines) still passes Phase 2 entry gate.
bugs.green_phase: No fix patch — spec-primary fix needed. Fix is adding 120-line minimum check to Phase 2 entry gate in SKILL.md:897-904. Green phase skipped.
